title: Numbers + letters mixed
text: I have 4 pets, 12 books, and 8 best friends. My grandma is 65. She makes 24 cookies every Sunday at 3 in the afternoon. Life is full of numbers and good things!
tips: All you've learned, all at once

character_tips.anna: Numbers and words flowing together. Real life!
character_tips.maxim: Mixed content at 46 WPM. Pre-final density.
character_tips.klavochka: Numbers and stories together, my dear 🌟
